# assert distributive transformation output for Server.uvl
$clausy -i input/Server.uvl -t cnf-dist print
---
c 1 Server
c 2 Server_MANDATORY_0
c 3 Server_OPTIONAL_0
c 4 FileSystem
c 5 OperatingSystem

c 7 APFS
c 8 EXT4

c 10 macOS
c 11 Debian
c 12 Logging
